_fixture_notice: INTENTIONAL NEGATIVE FIXTURE (F-007/037, handover minimum case 2) -- a baseline mixing states without timestamps: repository_references records TWO facts about the SAME repository (nizam-framework) at two different revisions, but the second (later) revision entry carries NO 'timestamp' -- an unanchored fact coexisting with an anchored one for the same repository. Must be rejected by schema/ecosystem_baseline.schema.json's per-item required:['revision','timestamp'] (protocol Sec 4: 'An evidence item with no declared revision, or no timestamp, is not a valid baseline entry' / 'a baseline MUST NOT mix evidence from unspecified revisions').
